microsoft_ft: Served as **technical partner** for enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), driving end-to-end deployment of resilience workflows from ideation to production across 45+ annual drills with **$14M+ business impact**.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, translating customer pain points into PRDs, self-service scheduling workflows, and success criteria that reduced operational toil by **30%**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and setting a new production validation standard.

Owned **end-to-end project documentation** — plans, trackers, and executive status updates — across 14 cross-org recovery executions, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring multi-project execution cycles to cut planning time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Collaborated with Product, Engineering, and Solutions teams to scope and prioritize the agentic automation roadmap, aligning **cross-functional stakeholders** on delivery timelines and measurable success criteria each quarter.
microsoft_2023: Drove **production adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows across 14 Azure service teams, conducting hands-on demos and onboarding sessions that saved **37 engineering hours** monthly and validated real customer value.

Translated 11+ customer discovery interviews into a prioritized **product requirements** doc, surfacing intent-based YAML generation as a critical gap and influencing its inclusion in the near-term roadmap.

Accelerated customer onboarding by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving self-service workflow resolution.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ service teams — translating customer pain into a clear delivery plan.

Conducted deployment discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch and building a structured roadmap to automate critical paths and scale production processes.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments each planning cycle.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the end-to-end legacy OS migration strategy, mapping all dependencies across 1,200+ stations before deploying to production.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process — maintaining structured trackers and status updates throughout the deployment lifecycle.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs between cross-functional stakeholders.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, building a structured CRM workflow that standardized the customer onboarding and project delivery lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to surface the right value to the right customers.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks — translating raw data into actionable requirements for the ops roadmap.
